title: CT4 legal branch run — Charging schemes
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT4 (Charging schemes). A conforming run may use only CT4 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT4 (Charging schemes); must equal "CT4".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT4 (Charging schemes) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT4.N01 through CT4.N17; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT4 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT4 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT4 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
